programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: After decades of neglect, Castle Heights Hospital, this symbol of the city's segregated past has been packed with dynamite and is ready to be demolished. No one knows that a gang leader, now in prison, hid the 3 million dollars in cash he stole from his rivals inside the abandoned building. Now, three desperate parties want the money - a blue collared ex-fighter (Adkins) who finds it while working as part of the demolition crew, a prison guard (Lundgren) willing to do anything to pay for his daughter's cancer treatment and a ruthless gang who claim to be the rightful owners. The demolition charges are set, everyone clears out and the Castle is set to fall in 90 minutes. The clock is ticking. Who will find the cash and: will they get out alive?

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep210: Islands of Palau & Guam
programme.desc: Exploring the islands of Palau and Guam includes a submarine view of the ocean wildlife, exploration of the battles of World War II, learning the culture of the locals and snorkeling among thousands of jellyfish. These islands have it all, including one of the most interesting foods Host Bill Ball has ever eaten—fruit bat.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: For the first time in Surviving Mann history, the contestants undergo intense combat training led by none other than Ken Shamrock—"the most dangerous man in the world." His relentless situation drills push this elite group beyond their limits, sharpening their instincts and forging next-level tactical readiness. As a new mission begins to take shape, the pressure mounts—and the team learns that the strongest among them will earn a game-changing reward. But in a world where every edge matters, not everyone is built to keep up. Fatigue sets in, tensions rise, and the difference between teammate and competitor begins to blur. With Shamrock watching closely, only the most disciplined will rise to meet the challenge—and prove they’re worthy of what lies ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: After another grueling PT session, the contestants are pushed to their limits with a new course of fire courtesy of Stag Arms. From long range, 500 yards, to standing, kneeling and a 100 meter dash- will anyone complete this challenging course of fire? After that, the teams are put through extensive land nav training.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: In this episode of Wildshots, host Tim Harmsen heads to Sig Sauer for an exclusive look inside one of America’s most advanced firearms manufacturing facilities. With a motto of “Every day you wake up and get a little better,” Sig Sauer lives up to its words—producing over 5,000 firearms a day with cutting-edge robotics and precision automation. After a full factory tour, Tim hits Sig’s state-of-the-art testing range to get hands-on with the legendary XM250 machine gun, pushing the limits of modern firepower. Then it’s time for some pure shooting mastery as Tim meets up with friend and firearms influencer 22Plinkster. Known for his unbelievable accuracy and showmanship, 22Plinkster ups the ante—splitting playing cards with a .22 bullet, upside down, and even splitting a single bullet mid-flight to hit two separate targets at once. Finally, the episode caps off with a nod to Hollywood as Tim checks out the Genesis Arms machinery seen in John Wick, blending cinematic cool with real-world firepower.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The moment the contestants have been training for is finally here. But when a surveillance mission turns into a CQB, the contestants have to put all their training to the test. Find out who won Surviving Mann Season Two and who was the MVP of the season.

programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.
